justification: NPZ contains 25 evaluation checkpoints across training.
Timeseries split — no shuffle. Earlier checkpoints = train, later = test.
This tests whether MAIRA can predict performance trajectory from early training.
Sorted by episode_id to preserve temporal order.
Small dataset (10 episodes) — using 70/15/15 split to preserve test integrity.
No random shuffle applied — episodic RL data has temporal dependency.
Test set uses final episodes — simulates evaluating on unseen future behavior.
